title: Adding notes/ remarks in Webhooks created by external apps
excerpt: Recently I noticed that webhooks created by external apps are locked and could not be edited. This includes adding/ editing the description. I find that this is very counterintuitive because I need to at least add some r…

posts.author: apa.transformation (APA Transformation)
posts.cookedHtml: Recently I noticed that webhooks created by external apps are locked and could not be edited. This includes adding/ editing the description. I find that this is very counterintuitive because I need to at least add some remarks to indicate which webhook links to which app or flow. Please allow the webhook owner to add description in the webhooks. Thanks
